---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the use case for this feature. Why would it be useful?

## Proposed Solution
If you have a specific implementation in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Roadmap Alignment
Check if this aligns with the current roadmap (#27) and which phase it might fit in.

## Related Issues
Link to related issues or documentation if applicable.
